name: SKELETON_TECHNOLOGYCLASS1__MEMBER_LOOKUP__TARGET_PAIR__ALL_TIME
description: Independent frame skeleton for discovering target pairs constrained by TechnologyClass1.
cypher_template:
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 50
examples: Which target-pair combinations fall under the Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers TechnologyClass1 category?
Which target-pair combinations belong to the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category?
Please list the target-pair combinations in the Other functional combination TechnologyClass1 category.
